title: Xining, Qinghai — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Xining, Qinghai: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Xining is a city in Qinghai with a population of 2,467,000. Capital of Qinghai province on the Tibetan Plateau, a gateway to Qinghai Lake and Kumbum Monastery with a distinct Tibetan-Hui cultural mix.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
